required_runway_clips.purpose: Task enters Codex as project execution, not chat.
HQ assigns named agent roles and ownership.
Agents debate and reject weak strategies before implementation.
Memory-first SESSION_BOOT opens known failures and validated patterns.
Builder creates real files, demos, docs, and checks.
Deferred gates stop risky live actions for human review.
Telemetry records success, failure, decision, and follow-up into memory.
